title: None Truly Happy Here.
content:
Happy's that man to whom God gives
    A stock of goods, whereby he lives
    Near to the wishes of his heart:
    No man is blest through every part.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "None Truly Happy Here."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
